zh.lifeSummary: Richard Bluett於大約1121年出生在英國可瓦爾爾斯頓。他與Mary de Grenville結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Bluett于大约1121年出生在英国可瓦爾爾斯頓。他与Mary de Grenville结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Bluett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blewett
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French bleuet, blouet ‘bluish’, a diminutive of bleu ‘blue’, more specifically ‘pale, pallid, wan’, or ‘fair-haired, golden-haired’. Compare Blew , Blewitt , and Bluett .

History: The Norman Ralph Bloet is mentioned in Domesday Book (1086) as lord of the manor of Hinton in Hampshire, recorded in 1246 as Henton Bluet (modern Hinton Blewett). From the late 12th century onward many Anglo-Norman knights acquired estates in Ireland. Ralph's presumed descendants, Thomas and Ralph Bluet, held lands in counties Cork and Limerick before and after 1254, and are ancestors of the modern Irish families named Bluett, Blewett, and Blewitt. In 1850, following the Irish Potato Famine in Ireland (1845–49), Patrick Blewitt, a son of Edward Blewitt of Ballina, County Mayo, migrated to North America, his whole family joining him in 1851 to settle in Scranton PA. Joe Biden (see Biden ), the 46th president of the US, is Edward's great-great-great grandson.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Bluett was born about 1121, in Helston, Cornwall, England. He married Mary de Grenville. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Bluett est né environ 1121, à Helston, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Il a épousé Mary de Grenville. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Bluett wurde um 1121 in Helston, Cornwall, England geboren. Er hat Mary de Grenville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Bluett è nato il circa 1121 nel Helston, Cornwall, England. Lui sposato Mary de Grenville. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.Helston, Cornwall, England: イギリスコルンワルヘルストン
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Bluettは約1121年にイギリスコルンワルヘルストンで生まれた。Mary de Grenvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Bluett(은)는 대략 1121년 영국 코른월 헬스턴에서 태어났다. 그는 Mary de Grenville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Bluett nasceu aproximadamente 1121, em Helston, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Mary de Grenville. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Bluett родился около 1121 г. в местности хелстон, корнвалл, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary de Grenville. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Bluett nació aproximadamente 1121, en Helston, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Se casó con Mary de Grenville. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
